title: Minister of Finance, the Economy and Investment for the Issue of Euro 30,000,000 Malta Government Stocks
title_en: Minister of Finance, the Economy and Investment for the Issue of Euro 30,000,000 Malta Government Stocks
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/502.2/mlt, expression eli/sl/502.2/20111115/mlt).

provisions.title: LEGAL NOTICE 431 of 2011
provisions.content:
The title of this Directive is Directive by the Minister of
Finance, the Economy and Investment for the Issue of Euro
30,000,000 Malta Government Stocks.

provisions.title: Title
provisions.content:
An amount of Euro 24,000,000 Malta Government Stock
shall be issued Floating Rate Malta Government Stock 2014 (v)
linked to the six-month Euribor.

provisions.title: Issuing of Stock
provisions.content:
The Stock shall be issued as set out in the prospectus.

Mode of issuing
Stock.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
All persons and, or entities are eligible to apply for this
Stock. Allotment will be applied as set out in the prospectus.

provisions.title: Allotment policy
provisions.content:
In terms of the Financial Markets Act, when this Stock has
been allotted, an application shall be made for this Stock to be
placed on the official list and for trading on the Malta Stock
Exchange.

Trading on the
Malta Stock
Exchange.

provisions.title: Exchange
provisions.content: The sum of money to be raised shall be Euro 24,000,000.

provisions.title: The sum of money to be raised shall be Euro 24,000,000
provisions.content:
(1) Interest shall be paid at the floating rate linked to the
six-month Euribor in effect on the applicable interest determination
date, plus a spread of 45 basis points (bps) calculated on Day Count
Fraction (Actual/360) for every Euro 100. The spread of 45bps is
fixed and applicable until the maturity of the Stock.

Sum of money to
be raised.
Rate of interest and
dates of payment.

(2) Interest shall be payable half yearly in arrears on the 23rd
of May and 23rd of November in every year for the duration of the
Stock.
(3) The first payment covering the period from the 23rd
November, 2011 to the 22nd May, 2012 (both dates inclusive), shall
be made on the 23rd day of May, 2012.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
The Floating Rate Malta Government Stock 2014 (V)
linked to the six-month Euribor shall be redeemed at par on the
23rd November, 2014.

Redemption of
Stock.
